# Allowlisted tracked generated files.
#
# Format:
# glob|kind|owner|reason
#
# Generated build output, downloaded release assets, archives, and packaged
# extension files should not be checked in. Lockfiles and fixture goldens are
# intentional generated artifacts and must stay explicitly owned.

Cargo.lock|rust_lockfile|rust|Pinned Cargo dependency graph.
editors/vscode/package-lock.json|editor_extension_lockfile|lsp/editor|Pinned npm dependency graph for the VS Code extension.
fixtures/**/expected/**|fixture_golden|analysis-fixtures|Fixture expected outputs are intentional golden artifacts.
